basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Executive Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 17 July 2026 on the official website iiti.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Indore Executive Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable: 05 years for Central/State Govt/Autonomous Bodies staff with 03 years of service; 05 years for IIT Indore contractual staff with 05 years of service.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Finance/Media with 60% marks or First Class, 15 years relevant administrative experience.
qualification.details: Executive Officer (Finance): Postgraduate degree in Finance from a recognized University/Institute with 60% marks or First Class. Executive Officer (Media): Postgraduate degree in Media from a recognized University/Institute with 60% marks or First Class. Experience: 15 years of relevant administrative experience in Central/State Govt/Autonomous Body/Central Educational Institution/University/IIT/IISER with a minimum of 5 years at Pay Level 11 or equivalent in a supervisory role.

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test Job Suitability Test Personality Test Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Indore Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Indore Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_indore_ii: Postgraduate degree in Finance/Media with 60% marks or First Class, 15 years relevant administrative experience.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Indore Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Indore Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Executive Officer (Finance): Postgraduate degree in Finance from a recognized University/Institute with 60% marks or First Class. Executive Officer (Media): Postgraduate degree in Media from a recognized University/Institute with 60% marks or First Class. Experience: 15 years of relevant administrative experience in Central/State Govt/Autonomous Body/Central Educational Institution/University/IIT/IISER with a minimum of 5 years at Pay Level 11 or equivalent in a supervisory role.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable: 05 years for Central/State Govt/Autonomous Bodies staff with 03 years of service; 05 years for IIT Indore contractual staff with 05 years of service.

content_sections.heading: IIT Indore Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test Skill Test Job Suitability Test Personality Test Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Indore Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Executive Officer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIT Indore Executive Officer recruitment is 06 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Executive Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Executive Officer post at IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Executive Officer role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Postgraduate degree in Finance or Media from a recognized university with at least 60% marks or First Class.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Executive Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Executive Officer position is 50 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Executive Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in Pay Level 12, ranging from ₹78,800 to ₹2,09,200 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is ₹1000/-.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fee exemptions?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Executive Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Skill Test, Job Suitability Test, Personality Test, and Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Indore Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total administrative experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to have 15 years of relevant administrative experience, with at least 5 years in a supervisory role at Pay Level 11 or equivalent.
